message:
fix: ADO/Jira custom type_map ignored + ADO dependency links not imported (fix-merge PR #2771)

ADO readMappingConfig used a hardcoded key list, silently dropping custom
types like story. Jira had no type_map loading at all despite being
documented. ADO ExtractLinkDeps stored bare numeric IDs but
createDependencies expects full web URLs, causing all dependency imports
to silently fail.

Co-Authored-By: Harry Miller <harry_miller@trimble.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
